== Notes for [[Item:Q2407|Q2407]] ==

{geni:about_me} HE IS SAID TO HAVE EATEN THE MEAT OF A RABBIT AT THE TIME OF SHRADDHA AND WAS KNOWN AS SHASAD. SOME RECORDS CLAIM HIM TO BE OF GRAND SON OF IKSHVAKU. HIS SON WAS KAKUSTHA OR PURANJAY..
<p>Kings of the Ikshvaku Dynasty</p>
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/vikukshi.html</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D53B28E1EFBBFC9A22EF79916BF213


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
